titleStmt.title: SII 37.504: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 504. (A.R. No. B 4 of 1943-44.) Nandavaram, Banganapalle Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Right pillar in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Chauḍēśvari temple.
The is date Śaka 1492 Pramādi, Āshāḍha śu. 12, Thursday, corresponding to 1570 A.D., June 15.

It records the resolution of the Vidvan-mahājanas of Nandavaram on the occasion when their agrahāra-village was restored to them and they were reinstated in it by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju-Tirumalarājayyadēva Mahārāju, that they would take to the study of the Vēdas and the Sastras and would not levy Kanyāśulka for marriage of girls in their community.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1492 Agunēṭi pramōda
saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 12 gu śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara rāmarāju tirumalarājayyadēva ma
hārājulayyavāriki śrīmadyajanādi ṣaṭka
rmaniratulaina naṁdavarāgrahārasthitāśēṣa vidvanma
hājanālunnu Āyurārōgya Aiśvarābhivṛddhinni
putrapautrābhivṛddhinni dhanakanaka vastu vāhana samṛ

ddhinni Itōdhika mahadaiśvaryavā nī Anēka rāja
dīnni Avunaṭugānu trisaṁdhyalānu Āśī¨rvadiṁci yi
ccina pratijñāpatrika kramameṭlannanu svāmi mā [Agrahā]
rānaku viccēśi duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭaparipālanaṁ cēśi [A]
grahāraṁ punaruddharaṇaṁ cēśi sarvamānyaṁgānu pari
pāliṁci rakṣiṁci maṁmu mā naṁdavarāgrahārāna
nu nilipitiri svāmiki puṇyaṁgānu mēmu vēdaśāstra
lu caduvukoni kanyāśulkaṁ peṭṭakanē kanyakalanu kanyā
dānālu cēssunnusēstimi Ī dharmaṁ kōru peṭukoni sukhā
na vuṁḍagalavāraṁ Ā maryāṁda naḍavaka yavvaru gana
ka kanyakalaku māḷlu konnānuṁnnu Ā kanyakalanu puccu

ganaka māḷlu peṭṭinānu
mātāpitṛlanuṁnnu gōbrāhmaṇulanuṁnnu vāraṇā
śilō vadhiṁcina pāpānabōyinavāru
damaged
koṁgalavāraṁ
śānanuya
rāja drōhaṁ cēśinānu
rājā nu Aha
baḍiyicina pratijñā śāsanaṁ śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.504 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
